body:
Following #11 -> we should do this for rubrics review as well? 

@sepo-agent /answer plan?

comments.body:
Yes, I’d apply the same pattern to rubrics review comments.

Current shape:

- #11 added minimization for AI review synthesis comments via `.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts`, which scans PR comments/reviews, matches authored agent output, and calls GitHub’s `minimizeComment(... OUTDATED)` mutation.
- The `/review` posting path uses that helper before posting a fresh synthesis comment in [`post-comment.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/post-comment.ts#L78-L92).
- Rubrics review posts through [`agent-rubrics-review.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-rubrics-review.yml#L146-L154) using [`post-response.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/post-response.ts#L38-L41), which currently just posts the body and has no minimization hook.
- Rubrics review comments are identifiable by the stable heading required in [`rubrics-review.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/prompts/rubrics-review.md): `## Rubrics Review`.

Implementation plan:

1. Generalize `.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts` from “review synthesis only” to “generated PR review-style comments” by accepting a body predicate or comment kind.
2. Add rubrics detection, likely `isRubricsReviewBody(body)`, matching `body.trimStart().startsWith("## Rubrics Review")`.
3. Keep the existing actor matching, pagination, duplicate ID handling, and `OUTDATED` minimization behavior from #11.
4. Wire `post-response.ts` to optionally collapse prior rubrics review comments when:
   - `RESPONSE_KIND=pr_comment`
   - the target is a PR number
   - the body being posted is a rubrics review
   - collapse is not disabled by an env flag, probably reusing `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` unless we want a rubrics-specific flag.
5. Leave failures non-blocking, same as `post-comment.ts`: warn, then still post the new rubrics review.
6. Add regression tests:
   - minimizer collapses prior visible rubrics review comments by the same app/user.
   - it does not collapse AI review synthesis when only rubrics collapse is requested, and vice versa.
   - `post-response` still posts if minimization fails.
   - optional disable flag skips minimization.
7. Run `.agent` tests, at minimum the minimizer and post-response/post-comment CLI tests; preferably `npm --prefix .agent test`.

No blocker from the current code. Main decision before coding: should rubrics minimization reuse `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`, or should it get a separate flag like `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_RUBRICS_REVIEWS`? I’d default to reusing the existing flag for consistency unless you want independent control.

title: When a new rubrics review is posted, we should also minimize previous ones?
